contract address management with a cached role to optimize gas usage for frequence accesses - Separated from `ContractUser` to save ~0.5 KB where needed","errors":{"RequestKeyConflict(bool,uint40,uint40,bytes16,bytes16)":[{"details":"Occurs during a request where (`reqId` is reused and/or `seqNum` < expected) and the prior call had a different key (caller,seqNum,reqId) so replay does not occur as it otherwise could","params":{"isNewReqId":"true: `reqIdAct` is new; false: value was reused with a different (caller,seqNum)","reqIdAct":"Actual request id received","reqIdExp":"Expected request id, based upon cache lookup by (caller,seqNum); Zero-value if !`isNewReqId`","seqNumAct":"Actual sequence number received","seqNumExp":"Expected sequence number based upon caller"}}],"SeqNumGap(uint40,uint40,address)":[{"details":"Occurs when seq num `rcvd` > `expect`, possible causes: error from network/provider/client/reorg     - Invariant: `seqNum` must increment monotonically for a write call, see table above","params":{"caller":"Caller's address","seqNumAct":"Received sequence number","seqNumExp":"Expected sequence number"}}]},"events":{"ReqAck(bytes16,address,uint40,(bytes16,uint16,uint16,uint16,uint40,uint40),bool)":{"details":"A Request Acknowledgement Event occurs at the end of each request (if no revert) and bridges the gaps between data sources, clients, lossy/unreliable protocols/providers/neworks, and the on-chain call outcome - Captures 3 categories of data for off-chain calls:     - Key inputs (indexed params) allow a tx search via either:         - PK1: reqId: Allows a tx search on a single field such as to fill a gap on replay         - PK2: (caller,seqNum): Allows a tx search to audit a sequence for a caller     - Context: `replay` and `callRes.blockNum` provide context on when/where this happened     - Output: `callRes` provides fields (rc, lrc, count) for either a simple result or summary         - Additional results can be found in the tx receipt logs from prior events in the same tx","params":{"callRes":"See `CallRes`; `reqId` and `ReqAck` are separate params for indexes","caller":"Account initiating the tx","replay":"false for an original event, true when `reqId` was already processed","reqId":"From CallRes: Request ID, allows for gap-fill on replay","seqNum":"From CallRes: Caller's sequence number incremented monotonically"}}},"kind":"dev","methods":{"getCallResByReqId(bytes16)":{"custom:api":"public","details":"Get a result for a prior write function call invoked from off-chain by this caller - Subject to storage lag when retrieved off-chain shortly after write, prefer the `ReqAck` event in that case","params":{"reqId":"Request ID of a prior call"},"returns":{"cr":"See `CallRes`"}},"getCallResBySeqNum(uint40)":{"custom:api":"public","details":"Get a result for a prior write function call invoked from off-chain by this caller - Subject to storage lag when retrieved off-chain shortly after write, prefer the `ReqAck` event in that case","params":{"seqNum":"Sequence number of a prior call by this caller"},"returns":{"cr":"See `CallRes`"}},"getContract(uint8)":{"details":"Get a contract address","params":{"contractId":"Contract ID requested"},"returns":{"_0":"Requested contract address"}},"getSeqNum(address)":{"details":"Get next expected seq num for the given account address","params":{"account":"Address to lookup"},"returns":{"seqNumEx":"Next expected seq num to be passed to a write function call from `account`"}},"preUpgrade(uint40,bytes16,bytes16)":{"details":"Stage values to use in the next call to `__authorizeUpgrade`","params":{"reqId":"Request ID, unique amongst requests across all callers","reqIdStage":"Param to stage","seqNumEx":"=0 for on-chain caller, else expected sequence number for determinism, etc; See `CallTracker`"}},"setContract(uint40,bytes16,uint8,address)":{"custom:api":"public","details":"Less size than separate setters","params":{"contractId":"Identifies the contract being getCallResByReqId(bytes16).details: Get a result for a prior write function call invoked from off-chain by this caller - Subject to storage lag when retrieved off-chain shortly after write, prefer the `ReqAck` event in that case

params.reqId: Request ID of a prior call

getCallResBySeqNum(uint40).details: Get a result for a prior write function call invoked from off-chain by this caller - Subject to storage lag when retrieved off-chain shortly after write, prefer the `ReqAck` event in that case

params.seqNum: Sequence number of a prior call by this caller

getSeqNum(address).details: Get next expected seq num for the given account address

returns.seqNumEx: Next expected seq num to be passed to a write function call from `account`

preUpgrade(uint40,bytes16,bytes16).details: Stage values to use in the next call to `__authorizeUpgrade`

params.reqId: Request ID, unique amongst requests across all callers
params.seqNumEx: =0 for on-chain caller, else expected sequence number for determinism, etc; See `CallTracker`

params.reqId: Request ID, unique amongst requests across all callers
params.seqNumEx: =0 for on-chain caller, else expected sequence number for determinism, etc; See `CallTracker`

documentation.text:
@dev Allows expiring role caching via:
 - Upgradability is not a concern for this ephemeral type
@dev Allows initialization by a creator before access control would otherwise allow
